DOC_ENABLED: Enable or disable the Curated Radio plugin globally.
DOC_DATABASE_PATH: SQLite database file used to store stations and status.
DOC_SEED_JSON_PATH: Path to your base station JSON file imported during sync.
DOC_FINDINGS_JSON_PATH: Path to discovery findings JSON used for new candidates.
DOC_AUTO_REFRESH: Automatically verify existing stream URLs on the schedule.
DOC_AUTO_DISCOVER: Automatically search for new curated stations on the schedule.
DOC_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MINUTES: Range 60-10080 minutes. Recommended 4320 (every 3 days) to keep discovery/refresh bounded.
DOC_DISCOVERY_API_BASE: Radio Browser API base URL used for discovery requests.
DOC_DISCOVERY_LIMIT: Range 10-120. Recommended 30 candidates per discovery run for quality with controlled runtime.
DOC_DISCOVERY_PROFILE_PROMPT: Profile text that guides discovery toward your preferred station style.
DOC_EDITORIAL_SOURCE_URLS: Optional comma-separated editorial pages/feeds used as extra discovery sources.
DOC_CURATED_TAG_SEEDS: Comma-separated curated tags that seed the discovery logic.
DOC_BLOCKED_NAME_PATTERNS: Comma-separated station name patterns to exclude.
DOC_DISCOVERY_CLOUD_TERM_LIMIT: Range 10-80. Recommended 40 term-cloud keywords for broad but stable discovery.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_ENABLED: Use AI to propose additional search terms for discovery.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_API_BASE: Base URL for the AI API endpoint.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_MODEL: Model name used for AI-assisted term expansion.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_API_KEY: API key for AI requests. Leave empty to use OPENAI_API_KEY env var.
DOC_DISCOVERY_AI_TERM_LIMIT: Range 0-12. Recommended 4 AI-suggested terms per run to limit API cost and runtime.
DOC_LAST_SYNC_SUMMARY: Summary of the most recent sync/discovery/refresh results.
DOC_LAST_CRAWLED_AT: Timestamp of the last discovery crawl run.
DOC_LAST_CHECKED_AT: Timestamp of the last stream health check run.
ROOT_DESCRIPTION: Curated radio lists backed by a local database
CURRENT_STATION_SAVED: Current station saved to Interesting Stations
CURRENT_STATION_REMOVED: Current station removed from Interesting Stations
